steps.title: Spot the defining purpose
steps.content: The key clue is that days were named “as a way of honoring an aspect of rural life.” This reveals the underlying PURPOSE that explains why any particular day received its name.

steps.title: Select the choice that explains the naming
steps.content: Choice C directly explains why Trefle was named: because days honor aspects of rural life, the clover was chosen for this purpose. The other choices either describe structural features (A), provide historical background without explanation (B), or mention facts without connecting them to the naming logic (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
